text_first_visit: An octagonal room with a sunken floor. At the center, a stone altar bears dried flowers and shattered pottery — offerings from long ago. A locked iron door leads deeper. Stairs descend into darkness.
text_revisit: The offering room. The altar is undisturbed.

interactables.name: Locked Iron Door
interactables.text_on_interact: The crypt key fits. The door groans open, revealing stairs descending into flooded darkness.

interactables.name: Stone Altar
interactables.text_on_interact: The offerings are centuries old. Whoever left them was honoring the dead — or asking for forgiveness.
